title: Prepared to bear consequences: Arvind Kejriwal to boycott Excise policy case proceedings before Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma
description: In a rare move, former Delhi Chief Minister and Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) chief Arvind Kejriwal has decided that he and his lawyers will not participate or argue further in the excise policy case proceedings before Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma.Justice Sharma is seized of an appeal filed by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) against the discharge of Kejriwal and all other accused in the corruption case.
